title: Integrate the community boards with the boards we make ourselves
excerpt:

no need for separate accounts for the community boards
all notifications are collected in 1 place

posts.author: robopzet (Rob Schlüter)
posts.cookedHtml:
Advantages:

  • no need for separate accounts for the community boards
  • all notifications are collected in 1 place
  • search can include issues I interacted with in the community

And we would get to see how to create such support features for our own customers.
